result.response_content_preview:
THOUGHT:
The search results successfully retrieved the exact foundational paper needed. Paper 0, "Benchmarking Neural Network Robustness to Common Corruptions and Perturbations" by Hendrycks & Dietterich (ICLR 2019), is the seminal work that introduced ImageNet-C and ImageNet-P. It directly addresses the need to evaluate model brittleness under natural, non-adversarial distribution shifts, which perfectly complements the existing citations on systemic technical debt (Sculley et al.) and adversarial features (Ilyas et al.). This paper will be cited to establish empirical benchmarks for real-world robustness, compare clean vs. corrupted accuracy, and highlight the persistent research gap in out-of-distribution generalization.
